seo.title: Privacy Policy | {{company}}
seo.description: Learn how {{company}} processes and protects personal data on {{domain}} in accordance with GDPR.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.heroMeta: effective from the date of publication on the website

admin.title: Data Controller
admin.text: {{company}} is the controller of personal data and processes it in accordance with applicable laws.

data.title: What personal data do we collect?
list: personal data provided via the contact form (name, phone number, email address)
data voluntarily submitted in messages (e.g. photos for quotation purposes)
technical data related to the use of the website (IP address, cookies)

purposes.title: Purpose of data processing
list: responding to user inquiries
preparing offers and providing services
processing payments (if applicable)
conducting marketing activities (only with user consent)
ensuring website security and proper functionality

legal.title: Legal basis for processing
legal.intro: Personal data is processed in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council (GDPR).
list: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR – performance of a contract
Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR – compliance with a legal obligation
Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR – legitimate interest of the controller
Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR – consent of the user

sharing.title: Data sharing
sharing.text: Personal data may be shared with entities cooperating with the controller only to the extent necessary to provide services (e.g. hosting providers, accounting services). Personal data is not sold to third parties.

retention.title: Data retention period
list: for the period necessary to fulfill the purpose of processing
in accordance with applicable legal requirements
until consent is withdrawn (in the case of marketing activities)

rights.title: User rights
list: the right to access personal data
the right to rectify personal data
the right to erase personal data
the right to restrict processing
the right to data portability
the right to object to processing
the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority

cookies.title: Cookies
list: ensuring proper website functionality
traffic analysis (e.g. Google Analytics)
marketing purposes (e.g. Google Ads / Meta Ads)
cookies.footer: Users can manage cookie settings in their browser.

changes.title: Changes to the Privacy Policy
changes.text: The current version of the Privacy Policy is always available on {{domain}}.
